description_long: This is a modern, single-seat armchair with a boxy silhouette and a deep, cushioned seat. The chair features a high, slightly reclined backrest and thick, padded armrests on both sides, providing comfort and support. Its upholstery appears to be a dark, possibly black or navy leather or faux leather, giving it a sleek and sophisticated look. The chair is supported by four slender, straight metal legs, which elevate it slightly off the ground and add a contemporary touch. The seat and back cushions are visibly plush, with a smooth, plain surface and subtle seams outlining their shape. This chair is well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with dark leather upholstery, thick cushions, and slim metal legs. It features a high backrest and padded armrests for comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, high backrest, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the thickness of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid backrest and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest and seat depth.
